title: The Shadow of the East
writer: Fanny Hatton, Frederic Hatton, Edith Maude Hull
actors: Frank Mayo, Mildred Harris, Norman Kerry
plot: Barry Craven meets former sweetheart Gillian Locke, who is visiting India with her father. Craven's love for Gillian is revived, but he already has a wife, Lolaire, a native. In a jealous rage, Lolaire kills herself, freeing Crave...
